messages.content:
# Follow this guide to get pure and get those beautiful skydomes and more updated visuals. (**Does not include rain**)
# ⚠️ Paid $$$ mod ⚠️

## Step 1
> Go to https://www.patreon.com/peterboese and subscribe to the **lowest level** to gain access to the download links for Pure. It is always suggested to download the latest current version unless stated otherwise.
> You will also need the most recent version of CSP: https://www.patreon.com/x4fab/posts You can subscribe to the **lowest level** to gain access.

## Step 2
> Once you have purchased Pure and downloaded it, please follow this video (Provided by the creator of Pure) for installation. [Click here for video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KJE2xac5f8s)
